name: Orchards Golf Course & Restaurant
about: The Orchards Golf Club & Restaurant in Belleville, Illinois, is a public facility featuring an 18-hole championship golf course, restaurant, and indoor simulator center. It is located minutes from St. Louis and offers both on-course and indoor golfing experiences. The venue provides a range of amenities including practice facilities, leagues, junior programs, and banquet spaces, making it suitable for individual players and groups alike.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art HD Golf simulators allow play on world's best courses
Expansive practice facility available for improvement and warm-ups
Affordable pricing and various membership options for regular players

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant service available at the venue
Restaurant serves alcohol; no BYOB restrictions mentioned

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, but it's common practice at golf facilities to provide rental equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service restaurant and bar, so outside food and drink policies are not specified. It's recommended to inquire directly about BYOB options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: While the exact time isn't specified, typical simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Orchards offers junior lessons and programs specifically designed for youth, making it a family-friendly option.
